summary: Festival System Overhaul - Iteration 132. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: countdown banners with timers, Storico (History) tab, Palma d'Oro CineWorld label, CinePass rewards (+5 CP, +2 CP), weighted voting description 'Voto pesato per livello e fama'. All new endpoints working: /api/festivals/countdown, /api/festivals/history, /api/player/iconic-prizes, /api/player/{player_id}/badges.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 13312-13384: AWARD_CATEGORIES includes best_production and best_surprise with proper translations
server.py lines 13903-13967: /api/festivals/countdown returns upcoming_festivals with has_palma_doro, top_nominees, target_date, rewards
server.py lines 13969-14000: /api/festivals/history returns past editions with winners
server.py lines 14002-14018: /api/player/iconic-prizes returns prizes, total_quality_bonus, palma_doro_count
server.py lines 14020-14058: /api/player/{player_id}/badges returns badges with festival awards and iconic prizes
server.py lines 13660-13693: Weighted voting calculates vote_weight based on level and fame, returns votes_remaining_today
server.py lines 13751-13771: Palma d'Oro awarded for Best Film at Golden Stars with +2% quality bonus
FestivalsPage.jsx: CountdownBanner component shows timer, has_palma_doro, top_nominees, CinePass rewards
FestivalsPage.jsx: EnvelopeReveal component for ceremony animation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Festival System Overhaul fully verified. Key findings: 1) All new endpoints working (/api/festivals/countdown, /api/festivals/history, /api/player/iconic-prizes, /api/player/{player_id}/badges). 2) AWARD_CATEGORIES includes best_production and best_surprise but these won't appear in current month's editions (created before categories were added). 3) Weighted voting shows 'Voto pesato per livello e fama' in edition description. 4) CinePass rewards visible on festival cards (+5 CP for Golden Stars, +2 CP for others). 5) Palma d'Oro CineWorld label visible on golden_stars countdown banner. 6) History tab ('Storico') shows 'Nessuna cerimonia conclusa ancora' since no ceremonies have completed yet.

countdown_endpoint.returns: upcoming_festivals with id, name, target_date, days_until, hours_until, rewards, has_palma_doro, top_nominees

history_endpoint.returns: history array with edition_id, festival_name, year, month, winners

badges_endpoint.returns: badges array with type, festival_name, category, film_title, prestige

festivals_cinepass_rewards.returns: cinepass field in rewards (5 for golden_stars, 2 for others)

palma_doro_implementation.behavior: Awarded for Best Film at Golden Stars, +2% quality bonus, stored in iconic_prizes collection

frontend_palma_doro_label.text: Palma d'Oro CineWorld - Bonus permanente +2% qualita

frontend_cinepass_rewards.shows: +5 CP for Premio Stelle d'Oro, +2 CP for others

frontend_weighted_voting_description.text: Voto pesato per livello e fama

frontend_ui_verification.festivals_page: Shows countdown banners with timers, festival cards with rewards, 5 tabs
frontend_ui_verification.golden_stars_detail: Shows 'Voto pesato per livello e fama', categories with nominees and vote buttons
frontend_ui_verification.history_tab: Shows 'STORICO CERIMONIE' with 'Nessuna cerimonia conclusa ancora' message
